zh.of Vohburg, Oberbayern, Bavaria: 德國貝也奧培爾巴也爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Diepold III. Markgraf von Vohburg於1075年出生在德國貝也奧培爾巴也爾時，他的父親Diepold II. Markgraf von Vohburg45歲，母親Luitgard Gräfin von Zähringen26歲。他於大約1105年與Adelheid von Polen結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1146年4月8日享年71歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Diepold III. Markgraf von Vohburg于1075年出生在德国貝也奧培爾巴也爾时，他的父亲Diepold II. Markgraf von Vohburg45岁，母亲Luitgard Gräfin von Zähringen26岁。他于大约1105年与Adelheid von Polen结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1146年4月8日享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: Markgraf
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Gerhard, Wolf.

German and Dutch: status name from Middle High German marcgrāve ‘margrave’ (which is a title derived from marc ‘boundary’ + grāve ‘royal judge’). In some cases the title may have been applied as a nickname for someone with overbearing behavior or as a metonymic occupational name for a servant in the household of a margrave.

variants.name: Margraf
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Mathias.
German and Dutch (of German origin): variant of   Markgraf  .

variants.name: Margrave
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Gerhard, Wolf.

German and Dutch: status name from Middle High German marcgrāve ‘margrave’ (which is a title derived from marc ‘boundary’ + grāve ‘royal judge’). In some cases the title may have been applied as a nickname for someone with overbearing behavior or as a metonymic occupational name for a servant in the household of a margrave.

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Vohburg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Vosberg
meanings: North German: topographic name from vos(sen)berg ‘fox-hole’. Compare Vosburg , Vosburgh , and Vossberg .

nameMeanings.name: Diepold
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: from a variant of the personal name Dietbald (see Theobald ).

variants.name: Theobald
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from þeud ‘people, race’ + bald ‘bold, brave’. The first element was altered under the influence of Greek theos ‘god’. This name was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain.

nameMeanings.name: III.
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Diepold III. Markgraf von Vohburg was born in 1075, in Oberbayern, Bavaria, Germany, his father, Diepold II. Markgraf von Vohburg, was 45 and his mother, Luitgard Gräfin von Zähringen, was 26. He married Adelheid von Polen about 1105. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 8 April 1146, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Diepold III. Markgraf von Vohburg est né en 1075, à Oberbayern, Bayern, Allemagne, son père, Diepold II. Markgraf von Vohburg, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Luitgard Gräfin von Zähringen, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Adelheid von Polen environ 1105. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 8 avril 1146, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Diepold III. Markgraf von Vohburg 1075 in Oberbayern, Bayern, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Diepold II. Markgraf von Vohburg 45 und seine Mutter Luitgard Gräfin von Zähringen 26. Er hat um 1105 Adelheid von Polen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 8. April 1146 im Alter von 71 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Diepold III. Markgraf von Vohburg è nato il nel 1075 nel Oberbayern, Bayern, Germania, il suo padre, Diepold II. Markgraf von Vohburg, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Luitgard Gräfin von Zähringen, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Adelheid von Polen circa 1105. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 8 aprile 1146, all'età di 71 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Diepold III. Markgraf von Vohburgが1075年にドイツバイエルンオバーバイエルンで生まれた時，父Diepold II. Markgraf von Vohburgは45歳，母Luitgard Gräfin von Zähringenは26歳であった。約1105年にAdelheid von Polenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1146年4月8日に71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Diepold III. Markgraf von Vohburg(이)가 1075년 독일 베이른 오버베이른에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Diepold II. Markgraf von Vohburg(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Luitgard Gräfin von Zähringen(은)는 26세였다. 그는 대략 1105년 Adelheid von Polen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1146년 4월 8일 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Diepold III. Markgraf von Vohburg nasceu em 1075, em Oberbayern, Bayern, Alemanha, seu pai, Diepold II. Markgraf von Vohburg, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Luitgard Gräfin von Zähringen, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Adelheid von Polen aproximadamente 1105. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 8 de abril de 1146, com 71 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Diepold III. Markgraf von Vohburg родился в 1075 г. в местности обирбеиирн, беиирн, Германия, его отцу по имени Diepold II. Markgraf von Vohburg было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Luitgard Gräfin von Zähringen, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Adelheid von Polen около 1105 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 8 апреля 1146 г. в возрасте 71 год.
